title: EventInstance
description: A versioned event instance within an Event Thread. The identity model has three layers: Observation (raw capture) → Event Instance (versioned research entity) → Event Thread (grouping). The event_dedup_key from the Signal Spine pipeline is used only for candidate generation and presentation dedup, not as final research identity.

canonical_event_instance_id.description: Stable identifier for this specific event instance version.

event_thread_ref.description: Reference to the Event Thread this instance belongs to.

relationship_to_thread.description: How this instance relates to its thread. Unresolved identities must NOT be auto-merged.

supersedes.description: Reference to an earlier event_instance_id that this instance supersedes, if applicable. Enables reversible identity.

superseded_by.description: Reference to a later event_instance_id that supersedes this instance, if applicable. Enables reversible identity.

observation_ref.description: Reference back to the raw Observation that triggered this Event Instance. Links the Event Instance to the Observation layer.

instance_version.description: Monotonic version number within the Event Thread. Updated on correction, update, or reversal.

instance_data.description: The event data fields for this version.

identity_merge_evidence.description: Evidence supporting an identity merge decision. Required when relationship_to_thread changes to a more specific type. Identity decisions must be evidence-based and reversible.
